source.paper: How APIs Create Growth by Inverting the Firm

specification.standard_errors: Main results clustered by gvkey; double-cluster result clustered by gvkey and date.
specification.singleton_handling: Firm and quarter singleton fixed-effect observations are iteratively removed before estimation to match reghdfe.
specification.duplicate_handling: The published Table 1 sample keeps the 11 duplicate gvkey-quarter rows present after preprocessing; this script keeps them as well.

results.model: Excluding Top 20 Firms with Most Popular APIs

Excluding Any Firm in Computer Services
